title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies:
Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance Digital Technologies!
